mapper.sql: c.id, c.cert_no, c.apply_id, c.patient_id, p.patient_name, p.patient_no, p.bed_no, c.ward_id, w.ward_name, c.person_id, ap.person_name, ap.id_card, ap.phone, ap.relation, c.cert_type, c.special_approval_id, c.current_leave_id, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.cert_status, c.issue_user_name, c.issue_time, c.invalid_reason, c.invalid_time, c.invalid_operator_name, ap.id_card_expire_date, w.is_isolation
mapper.select: SELECT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gate_record gr WHERE gr.cert_id = c.id AND gr.deleted = 0 AND gr.gate_type = 1 AND gr.check_result = 1 AND DATE(gr.check_time) = CURDATE()) AS today_in_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gate_record gr WHERE gr.cert_id = c.id AND gr.deleted = 0 AND gr.gate_type = 2 AND gr.check_result = 1 AND DATE(gr.check_time) = CURDATE()) AS today_out_count FROM accompany_certificate c LEFT JOIN patient p ON c.patient_id = p.id LEFT JOIN ward w ON c.ward_id = w.id LEFT JOIN accompany_person ap ON c.person_id = ap.id WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND c.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gate_record gr WHERE gr.cert_id = c.id AND gr.deleted = 0 AND gr.gate_type = 1 AND gr.check_result = 1 AND DATE(gr.check_time) = CURDATE()) AS today_in_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gate_record gr WHERE gr.cert_id = c.id AND gr.deleted = 0 AND gr.gate_type = 2 AND gr.check_result = 1 AND DATE(gr.check_time) = CURDATE()) AS today_out_count FROM accompany_certificate c LEFT JOIN patient p ON c.patient_id = p.id LEFT JOIN ward w ON c.ward_id = w.id LEFT JOIN accompany_person ap ON c.person_id = ap.id WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND c.cert_no = #{certNo} ORDER BY c.issue_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT , 0 AS today_in_count, 0 AS today_out_count FROM accompany_certificate c LEFT JOIN patient p ON c.patient_id = p.id LEFT JOIN ward w ON c.ward_id = w.id LEFT JOIN accompany_person ap ON c.person_id = ap.id WHERE c.deleted = 0
AND c.ward_id = #{wardId}
AND c.cert_status = #{certStatus}
AND p.patient_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{patientName}, '%')
AND ap.person_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{personName}, '%')
AND c.cert_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{certNo}, '%')
ORDER BY c.issue_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM accompany_certificate WHERE deleted = 0 AND patient_id = #{patientId} AND cert_status = 1
